name: github-agentops-book
description: Issue→Agent→PR→反復→マージの運用を、Copilot instructions / AGENTS.md / Skills / custom agents / hooks / policy controls / MCP / tool exposure / CI で標準化するための実践ガイド。例: Copilot cloud agent / third-party agents（OpenAI Codex 等）/ Copilot CLI。
author: ITDO Inc.

scripts.preview: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory docs
scripts.build:validate: npm run build && npm run check-links && npm run check:figures
scripts.test: npm run check:metadata && npm run test:pages-template && npm run lint && npm run build:validate
